title: Part-Engraving 'Adventure' by Markus Götz for RUNDEL Verlag
summary: Started engraving parts for Markus Götz’s piece 'Adventure' for RUNDEL Verlag. A beautiful work taking shape in Rot an der Rot. First collaboration with RUNDEL Verlag, hope for many more.
author: ZSCORE Team

contentBlocks.value: Today we started engraving a fresh set of parts for *Adventure* by Markus Götz, published by RUNDEL Verlag. A beautiful piece, soon to be ready in the quiet town of Rot an der Rot. Our first collaboration with RUNDEL Verlag. Hope for many more.

contentBlocks.alt: Engraving session for Markus Götz's Adventure
contentBlocks.caption: First collaboration with RUNDEL Verlag.

title: Welcome to ZSCORE.studio - We Are Officially Live!
summary: ZSCORE.studio is now live! Discover our passion for contemporary music and the specialized services we offer to composers, orchestras, and ensembles dedicated to pushing artistic boundaries.
author: ZSCORE Team

contentBlocks.value:
### Welcome to ZSCORE.studio!

We are incredibly excited to announce that **ZSCORE.studio is officially live!** After much dedication and passion poured into its creation, our new online home is ready for you to explore. This marks the beginning of a new chapter for us, and we're thrilled to share it with the vibrant community of composers, musicians, and institutions dedicated to contemporary music.

contentBlocks.alt: Artistic representation of contemporary musical ideas
contentBlocks.caption: Dedicated to the future of music.

contentBlocks.value:
### Our Vision: Precision Meets Artistic Intent

At ZSCORE.studio, our mission is to provide unparalleled technical execution that aligns perfectly with your artistic vision. We are a collective engraving and editorial studio specialized in serving those working at the forefront of musical innovation. We believe that the meticulous preparation of musical scores and materials is foundational to impactful performances and the enduring legacy of new works.

### What We Offer:

We invite you to discover the range of specialized services tailored to the unique needs of contemporary music creation and performance:

* **Score Engraving & Editorial:** Crafting high-precision digital scores and performance materials for even the most complex contemporary works.
* **Computer-Assisted Orchestration:** Utilizing rule-based systems to help translate sketches and concepts into meticulously structured scores.
* **Custom Software Tools:** Developing browser-based and standalone applications for notation, harmony, tuning, and interactive musical systems.
* **Technical Consulting:** Providing expert solutions for notation challenges, plugin development, score formatting, and performance logistics.
* **Content Creation for Social Media:** Designing and producing specialized content to effectively present complex musical work to a wider online audience.

Explore our [Services Page](http://www.ZSCORE.studio/#services) for more in-depth information on how we can support your projects.

### Join Us on This Journey!

This website is more than just a portfolio; it's a platform for connection, collaboration, and the celebration of new music. We encourage you to browse through our services, learn more about our approach, and see how we can contribute to your next groundbreaking project.

We're immensely proud of what we've built and are eager to start conversations, forge partnerships, and help bring extraordinary musical ideas to life.

Welcome to ZSCORE.studio – let's create the future of music, together.
